description: TDOH: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Tennessee.
citation: Tenn. Comp. R. & Regs. 1200-08-01 / Tennessee Department of Health

description: TDOH: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
TDOH: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
TDOH: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
TDOH: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width per NFPA 101.
TDOH: Surgical suites 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA filtration.
TDOH: Certificate of Need required for new hospital beds, services, and capital expenditures above threshold. Tennessee Health Services and Development Agency (HSDA) administers CON.
citation: T.C.A. §68-11-1601 — Tennessee Health Services and Development Act / CON

description: TDOH: All hospital construction plans must be reviewed by Tennessee Department of Health, Health Facilities Division, prior to construction.
